svg.text: Fig. 5-style inspection redraw: conservative native PAF nb:i:1 -> sweepGA 1:1, no scaffold
Rows are child/query chromosome ends; p-arm tracks are left and q-arm tracks right. Query scale is the 500 kb flank span parsed from path names, not odgi PAF column 2.
